{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2103975?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Kocal", "id": 2103975, "login": "Kocal", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIxMDM5NzU=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49212", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}], "description": "### Description

In `symfony/ux-live-component`, a component's server-side state is exposed to the browser as a set of props (`#[LiveProp]`-annotated properties). Props marked `writable: true` can be freely changed by the client. Read-only props are round-tripped to the browser and back, and their integrity is protected by an HMAC so the client cannot tamper with them. Child components additionally receive a `propsFromParent` blob, also HMAC-signed.

The HMAC computed by `Symfony\UX\LiveComponent\LiveComponentHydrator` covered only the sorted prop key/value pairs. It didn't include the component name, the slot identifier (`props` vs `propsFromParent`), or any request context, and a single application-wide secret is used for every component. A signed blob the server minted for component A is therefore a valid signature for component B if the key names happen to match, and a `props` blob can be replayed in the `propsFromParent` slot (or the reverse). An attacker can use this to set a read-only prop on a target component to a value they were only ever allowed to choose as a writable prop on another component.

### Resolution

The HMAC is now bound to its context: the component name and a slot identifier are included in the pre-image before hashing. Two constants (`CHECKSUM_SLOT_PROPS` and `CHECKSUM_SLOT_PROPS_FROM_PARENT`) name the two slots, and `calculateChecksum()`, `verifyChecksum()`, `addChecksumToData()`, and `ChildComponentPartialRenderer` thread these values through. Cross-component and cross-slot replays no longer verify.

The patch for this issue is available [here](https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/a224b5af3e2e33ee14ac71356ae0e0877900a81c) for branch 2.x (and forward-ported to 3.x).

### Credits

Symfony would like to thank Anthropic (via Project Glasswing) for reporting the issue and Hugo Alliaume for providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0018, "percentile": 0.07662}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-34w5-c283-j9fg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T19:34:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-34w5-c283-j9fg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-34w5-c283-j9fg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49212"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T19:34:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/symfony/ux/security/advisories/GHSA-34w5-c283-j9fg", "https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/a224b5af3e2e33ee14ac71356ae0e0877900a81c", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/symfony/ux-live-component/CVE-2026-49212.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-34w5-c283-j9fg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/symfony/ux/security-advisories/GHSA-34w5-c283-j9fg", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/symfony/ux", "summary": "symfony/ux-live-component: LiveComponentHydrator HMAC checksum lacks component and slot binding", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T19:34:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-34w5-c283-j9fg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.36.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.8.0, < 2.36.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: symfony/ux-live-component: LiveComponentHydrator HMAC checksum lacks component and slot binding
